sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14073" key="a)po/tmhcis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπό-τμηξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14073.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cutting off,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0643.tlg001:32:51" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.Lond.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.51</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
